title: juno aitchisonii
intro: Juno aitchisonii, also known as the Aitchison's juno or Himalayan juno, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asclepiadaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Juno aitchisonii include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and improving breathing. Juno aitchisonii is often prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, or used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being and respiratory health.
